headline: CBTS Accelerates North American Growth as Clients Invest in AI, Security, and Resilient Infrastructure
summary: CINCINNATI, June 25, 2026--CBTS, a leading technology services company, today announced CBTS surpassed 3,000 clients across North America in 2026, scaled its Forge AI practice to meet rising demand for AI-ready infrastructure, and earned a Net Promoter Score of 82 placing it in the top 1% of B2B technology service providers globally. The results reflect growing demand for a technology partner that can move AI into production without compromising security or business continuity.
